news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
LNG disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz halve India's urea output, impacting plants' operations.
Petronet LNG declared force majeure as upstream suppliers failed to deliver contracted LNG volumes.
news.summary:
LNG disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz halve India's urea output, impacting plants' operations.
Petronet LNG declared force majeure as upstream suppliers failed to deliver contracted LNG volumes.

news.title:
Petronet LNG's board approves wholly-owned subsidiary for energy innovations.
The subsidiary will focus on startup support and sustainable business initiatives.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG's board approves wholly-owned subsidiary for energy innovations.
The subsidiary will focus on startup support and sustainable business initiatives.

news.title:
FirstCry, GMDC, and Petronet LNG emerge as key movers on Friday.
These stocks showed notable performance changes among 7 top movers.

news.title:
Nomura cuts Petronet LNG's price target to ₹340 from ₹370, maintaining a 'buy' rating.
West Asia crisis impacts near-term volumes; FY27 EBITDA cut by 23%. Stock trades at ₹271.9, near 52-week low.
news.summary:
Nomura cuts Petronet LNG's price target to ₹340 from ₹370, maintaining a 'buy' rating.
West Asia crisis impacts near-term volumes; FY27 EBITDA cut by 23%. Stock trades at ₹271.9, near 52-week low.

news.title:
Petronet LNG, GAIL shares plunged after Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG facility damage raised global gas supply concerns.
Petronet LNG dropped 5.9%, GAIL fell 3.2%, amid fears of supply disruptions from the world's largest LNG export hub.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG, GAIL shares plunged after Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG facility damage raised global gas supply concerns.
Petronet LNG dropped 5.9%, GAIL fell 3.2%, amid fears of supply disruptions from the world's largest LNG export hub.

news.title:
West Asia crisis leads Petronet LNG, QatarEnergy to invoke force majeure.
Force majeure excuses contract obligations due to uncontrollable events.
news.summary:
West Asia crisis leads Petronet LNG, QatarEnergy to invoke force majeure.
Force majeure excuses contract obligations due to uncontrollable events.

news.title:
Petronet LNG Ltd paid fines to NSE and BSE for SEBI LODR non-compliance.
Fines amounted to Rs. 1.77 lakh each, paid post-TDS with transaction IDs provided.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG Ltd paid fines to NSE and BSE for SEBI LODR non-compliance.
Fines amounted to Rs. 1.77 lakh each, paid post-TDS with transaction IDs provided.

news.title:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.
news.summary:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.

news.title:
Petronet LNG reports block trade of Rs. 32.3 Cr for 1,103,156 shares.
Shares traded at Rs. 292.85 each in the transaction.
news.summary:

news.title:
Markets rebounded with over 1% gains as Nifty crossed 24,600 resistance.
Mixed global cues and hurdles at 24,800-25,000 may impact sustainability.
news.summary:

news.title:
MRPL denies force majeure amid Iran conflict; fuel operations remain uninterrupted despite crude flow concerns.
MRPL shares rose 2.7% to ₹196.35; Petronet LNG issued force majeure notices due to Strait of Hormuz security risks.
news.summary:
MRPL denies force majeure amid Iran conflict; fuel operations remain uninterrupted despite crude flow concerns.
MRPL shares rose 2.7% to ₹196.35; Petronet LNG issued force majeure notices due to Strait of Hormuz security risks.

news.title:
Qatar LNG disruption could impact India's gas market; Petronet, GAIL, Gujarat Gas may face pressure.
Petronet LNG might see the largest impact due to heavy reliance on Qatar supply, per JM Financial analysis.
news.summary:
Qatar LNG disruption could impact India's gas market; Petronet, GAIL, Gujarat Gas may face pressure.
Petronet LNG might see the largest impact due to heavy reliance on Qatar supply, per JM Financial analysis.

news.title: JM Financial predicts a Strait of Hormuz disruption may reduce Petronet volumes by 5-6%.

news.title:
Petronet's LNG volumes may drop 5-6% due to Strait of Hormuz tensions.
Crude price rise of $5-7/barrel may benefit ONGC, Oil India by 10-15%.

news.title:
Indian gas firms, like Gujarat Gas and Petronet, limit domestic supply citing force majeure.
Fertiliser sector impacted as Middle East conflict disrupts natural gas imports.
news.summary:

Qatar halts LNG production; impacts Petronet, Shipping Corp operations.
news.summary:

news.title:
Petronet LNG stock crashes 9.06% to ₹280.7 after invoking force majeure due to Iran-Israel conflict blocking Qatar gas route.
Disruption affects LNG tankers and downstream partners GAIL, IOCL, BPCL; insurance doesn't cover war-related business interruptions.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG stock crashes 9.06% to ₹280.7 after invoking force majeure due to Iran-Israel conflict blocking Qatar gas route.
Disruption affects LNG tankers and downstream partners GAIL, IOCL, BPCL; insurance doesn't cover war-related business interruptions.

news.title:
Petronet LNG shares fell over 6%, while Torrent Power dropped 3% in early trading.
Decline attributed to concerns over LNG supply impacting market sentiment.
news.summary:
